writingError.stem: Last year, the charity raised enough money to build a school, and by the time the building (A)[was completed], hundreds of children (B)[had registered], although classes (C)[have not started] until the following term (D)[began].
writingError.explanation_th: บริบทอดีต (last year) → classes did not start until... | have not started (Present Perfect) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: The committee praised the design for its (A)[creativity] and (B)[practical], noting that it combined (C)[beauty] with (D)[functionality] in an impressive way.
writingError.explanation_th: ขนานกับ creativity (คำนาม) → its creativity and practicality | practical เป็น adjective (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The new app was praised for being (A)[user-friendly], (B)[reliable], and (C)[secure], qualities that contributed to its rapid (D)[grow] in popularity.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง its rapid ต้องเป็นคำนาม → its rapid growth | grow เป็นกริยา (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The doctor (A)[which treated] my grandmother was extremely kind, explaining everything clearly to the family (B)[who were] worried and answering all the questions (C)[that we had] (D)[with great patience].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคน (the doctor) ใช้ who → who treated | which ใช้กับสิ่งของ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The ancient manuscript, (A)[which] had survived for centuries, contained knowledge (B)[that] scholars had long sought, written in a language (C)[who only] a few experts (D)[could read].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายสิ่งของ (a language) ใช้ that/which ไม่ใช้ who → that only a few experts could read | who ใช้กับคน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The report (A)[was completed] last week, and after it (B)[was reviewing] by senior staff, it (C)[was sent] to the board, which (D)[approved] it immediately.
writingError.explanation_th: รายงานถูกตรวจ (passive) → was reviewed by senior staff | was reviewing เป็น active (ผิด รายงานเป็นผู้ถูกกระทำ)

writingError.stem: The new species (A)[was discovered] in the rainforest, (B)[was photographed] by researchers, and (C)[has been studied] ever since, but it (D)[has not yet name] officially.
writingError.explanation_th: สิ่งมีชีวิตถูกตั้งชื่อ (passive) → has not yet been named | name รูปฐาน ขาด been (ผิด รูป passive)

writingError.stem: The new method proved (A)[more efficienter] than the old one, saving time and money, and producing results that were (B)[far more accurate], (C)[easier to verify], and (D)[more widely accepted].
writingError.explanation_th: efficient ใช้ more + adj → more efficient | more efficienter ซ้ำขั้นกว่า (ผิด ห้ามใส่ทั้ง more และ -er)

writingError.stem: The two restaurants are equally popular: the first offers (A)[a wider] menu, the second has (B)[friendlier] staff, but the food at the first is (C)[gooder] than at the second, (D)[according to] most reviews.
writingError.explanation_th: good เป็นคำขั้นกว่าผิดปกติ → better | gooder ไม่มีในภาษาอังกฤษ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The new policy aims to reduce pollution, and although it has faced criticism, (A)[most experts] support it, (B)[it offers] a realistic path toward cleaner air (C)[without harming] the economy, (D)[a balance] many countries struggle to achieve.
writingError.explanation_th: สองอนุประโยคต่อกันต้องมีตัวเชื่อม → because it offers a realistic path | it offers ทำให้เกิด comma splice (ผิดโครงสร้าง)

writingError.stem: The findings, (A)[which] surprised many researchers, (B)[were published] in a leading journal, (C)[sparking] intense debate, (D)[but the conclusions controversial] among experts.
writingError.explanation_th: อนุประโยคขาดกริยา → but the conclusions were controversial | the conclusions controversial ขาด verb-to-be (ผิดโครงสร้าง)

writingError.stem: The charity provides (A)[the food] and shelter to families in need, offering (B)[a safe] place to stay, (C)[warm] meals, and (D)[hope] for a better future.
writingError.explanation_th: food แบบกล่าวทั่วไป (นามนับไม่ได้) ไม่ใช้ the → provides food and shelter | the food สื่อเฉพาะเจาะจง (ผิดบริบท)

writingError.stem: The young musician dreamed of playing at (A)[a famous] concert hall, practising for hours every day, performing at (B)[local] events, and gradually building (C)[the reputation] as (D)[a talented] pianist.
writingError.explanation_th: กล่าวถึงครั้งแรกแบบไม่เจาะจง → building a reputation | the reputation สื่อเฉพาะเจาะจง (ผิดบริบท)

writingError.stem: The team of researchers (A)[has published] its findings, and although each of the members (B)[have] a different specialty, they all agree that the results (C)[are] significant and (D)[deserve] further study.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน each of the members เอกพจน์ → each ... has a different specialty | have ผิด SVA (each + เอกพจน์)

writingError.stem: The government's new measures (A)[have] reduced unemployment, and the economy (B)[is] growing steadily, which (C)[suggests] that the policies (D)[is working] as intended.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน the policies (พหูพจน์) → are working | is ผิด SVA

writingError.stem: (A)[Because of] the storm damaged the power lines, thousands of homes lost electricity, (B)[and] schools were forced to close, (C)[although] repair crews worked (D)[around the clock].
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยประโยค (the storm damaged...) ต้องใช้ Because → Because the storm damaged | Because of ตามด้วยนามเท่านั้น (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The new train service is fast and reliable; (A)[as a result], more commuters are using it, (B)[and] road traffic has fallen, (C)[despite] ticket prices remain affordable (D)[for everyone].
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยประโยค (ticket prices remain...) ต้องใช้ while/and → while ticket prices remain affordable | despite ตามด้วยนาม/V-ing เท่านั้น (ผิด)

writingError.stem: (A)[Determined] to win the competition, the young chef practised every day, (B)[experiment] with new recipes and (C)[refining] his techniques, (D)[hoping] to impress the judges.
writingError.explanation_th: ขนานกับ refining (participle) → experimenting with new recipes | experiment รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V-ing)

writingError.stem: The government introduced the programme (A)[to support] small businesses, (B)[offering] low-interest loans, (C)[providing] free training, and (D)[reduce] unnecessary regulations.
writingError.explanation_th: ขนานกับ offering/providing (participle) → reducing unnecessary regulations | reduce รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V-ing)

writingError.stem: If researchers (A)[will find] a cure for the disease, millions of lives could be saved, healthcare costs would fall, and families (B)[would no longer] suffer, which is why funding (C)[is] so important (D)[today].
writingError.explanation_th: อนุประโยค if ใช้ปัจจุบัน ไม่ใช้ will → if researchers find a cure | will find ผิด (ห้าม will ใน if-clause)

writingError.stem: If the warning had been issued sooner, people (A)[would have evacuated] in time, the damage (B)[would have been] less severe, and many lives (C)[will have been] saved, but sadly the alert (D)[came] too late.
writingError.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 3 (if + had been issued) ใช้ would have → would have been saved | will have been ผิด (ต้องเป็น would ในประโยคสมมุติอดีต)

writingError.stem: The new employee wondered (A)[whether] she had made the right choice, (B)[what would her colleagues think], and how long it would take to feel comfortable (C)[in such] a large company (D)[full of strangers].
writingError.explanation_th: คำถามซ้อน (indirect) เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผัน → what her colleagues would think | what would her colleagues think ผิด (ห้ามผันแบบคำถามตรง)

writingError.stem: The collector proudly displayed (A)[a rare ancient] coin, (B)[a beautifully carved] wooden box, and (C)[several antique] maps, each one (D)[a Chinese small] treasure from the imperial era.
writingError.explanation_th: ลำดับคำคุณศัพท์: ขนาด (small) มาก่อนสัญชาติ (Chinese) → a small Chinese treasure | a Chinese small ผิดลำดับ

writingError.stem: (A)[Her and I] have been best friends since childhood, sharing every secret, supporting (B)[each other] through hard times, and trusting (C)[each other completely], a bond that means everything to (D)[us].
writingError.explanation_th: เป็นประธานของ have been ต้องใช้สรรพนามประธาน → She and I have been | Her and I ผิด (her เป็นกรรม)

writingError.stem: The company rewarded its top employees, giving (A)[them] bonuses and praising (B)[their] achievements, but some staff felt that the credit belonged to the whole team, not just to a few of (C)[they], which caused (D)[some] resentment.
writingError.explanation_th: หลังบุพบท of ต้องใช้สรรพนามกรรม → a few of them | they เป็นประธาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The scientist recommended (A)[testing] the theory carefully, warned against (B)[to rush] the experiment, and suggested (C)[repeating] it several times before (D)[drawing] conclusions.
writingError.explanation_th: warn against + V-ing → warned against rushing | to rush ผิด (หลัง against ต้องเป็น gerund)

writingError.stem: The manager encouraged the team (A)[to share] ideas freely, allowed them (B)[to make] their own decisions, and helped them (C)[to develop] new skills, hoping (D)[improving] overall performance.
writingError.explanation_th: hope + to V → hoping to improve | improving ผิด (hope ตามด้วย to-infinitive)

writingError.stem: The teacher insisted that each student (A)[submits] the assignment on time, that no one (B)[copy] from others, and that everyone (C)[work] independently (D)[during the exam].
writingError.explanation_th: insist that + ประธาน + กริยาฐาน (subjunctive) → that each student submit | submits ผิด (ห้ามเติม -s)

writingError.stem: It is important that the bridge (A)[be inspected] regularly, that any damage (B)[be reported] immediately, that repairs (C)[are carried out] promptly, and that safety (D)[remain] the top priority.
writingError.explanation_th: It is important that + ประธาน + (should) be + V3 (subjunctive) → that repairs be carried out | are carried out ผิด (ต้องเป็นรูปฐาน be)

writingError.stem: The author (A)[has written] more than twenty novels, and by the time she retires next year, she (B)[will have published] her final book, a story she (C)[is working] on since 2019 (D)[without a break].
writingError.explanation_th: since 2019 → has been working on | is working (ปัจจุบันต่อเนื่องล้วน ไม่มี since) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: When the explorers reached the summit, they (A)[realised] that no one (B)[had ever stood] there before, and they (C)[felt] a deep pride that they (D)[will never forget].
writingError.explanation_th: เล่าอดีต (reached, felt) → future-in-past: would never forget | will never forget ไม่สอดคล้องกาลอดีต (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The (A)[approve] of the project by the council allowed construction to begin, creating (B)[numerous] jobs and bringing (C)[significant] benefits to the (D)[local] community.
writingError.explanation_th: ตำแหน่งประธาน/หลัง the ต้องเป็นคำนาม → the approval of the project | approve เป็นกริยา (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The film received praise for its (A)[stunning] visuals, its (B)[emotion] depth, and its (C)[powerful] message about (D)[forgiveness].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคำนาม depth ต้องใช้ adjective → emotional depth | emotion เป็นคำนาม (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The volunteers (A)[who joined] the project came from many countries, working alongside local people (B)[whose lives] had been affected by the disaster, in a community (C)[what welcomed] them (D)[with open arms].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคำนาม (a community) ใช้ that/which ไม่ใช้ what → that welcomed | what ขยายนามไม่ได้ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The scientist published a paper (A)[that challenged] existing theories, attracting attention from colleagues (B)[who] admired her courage and critics (C)[whom] she respected, opening a debate (D)[whose] lasted for years.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยาย a debate เป็นประธานของ lasted → that/which | whose ต้องตามด้วยคำนาม (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The old factory (A)[is demolishing] next month, and once the site (B)[has been cleared], a new park (C)[will be created], which (D)[will benefit] the whole neighbourhood.
writingError.explanation_th: โรงงานถูกรื้อ (passive) → is being demolished | is demolishing เป็น active (ผิด โรงงานเป็นผู้ถูกกระทำ)

writingError.stem: The rare painting, which (A)[had been hidden] for decades, (B)[was discover] in an old attic, (C)[was carefully restored], and (D)[is now displayed] in a national museum.
writingError.explanation_th: Passive อดีต ต้องใช้ was + กริยาช่อง 3 → was discovered | discover รูปฐาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The new policy is (A)[more effective] and (B)[less costly] than the previous one, making it (C)[the most good] option available, (D)[according to] independent analysts.
writingError.explanation_th: good ขั้นสูงสุดผิดปกติ → the best option | the most good ผิด (ไม่มี most good)

writingError.stem: The second edition of the textbook is (A)[much clearer] than the first, with (B)[better] examples, (C)[more detailed] explanations, and exercises that are (D)[more challenging then] before.
writingError.explanation_th: เปรียบเทียบใช้ than (ไม่ใช่ then) → more challenging than before | then = แล้ว/ตอนนั้น (สะกดผิดหน้าที่ ผิด)

writingError.stem: (A)[Although the bad weather], the match continued, (B)[which] delighted the fans, (C)[even though] the players struggled, (D)[slipping] on the wet ground.
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยนาม (the bad weather) ต้องใช้ Despite → Despite the bad weather | Although ตามด้วยประโยคเต็ม (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The committee reviewed the proposal carefully, and although they had concerns, (A)[they approved] it, (B)[because was] supported by strong evidence, (C)[which] convinced even (D)[the doubtful members].
writingError.explanation_th: อนุประโยค because ต้องมีประธาน → because it was supported | because was ขาดประธาน (ผิดโครงสร้าง)

writingError.stem: The lecture explored (A)[the role] of art in society, examining how it reflects (B)[culture], challenges (C)[the power], and inspires (D)[change].
writingError.explanation_th: นามธรรมทั่วไป (power) ในชุดขนาน (culture/change) ไม่ใช้ the → challenges power | the power สื่อเฉพาะเจาะจง (ผิดบริบท)

writingError.stem: The young scientist hoped to make (A)[a discovery] that would change the world, spending years in (B)[the laboratory], analysing (C)[data], and writing (D)[the report] after report to record her progress.
writingError.explanation_th: สำนวน report after report ไม่ใช้ article → writing report after report | the report ผิด (โครงสร้าง noun after noun ไม่ใส่ article)

writingError.stem: The variety of dishes on the menu (A)[are] impressive, and although the restaurant (B)[is small], each of the meals (C)[is] prepared with care, which (D)[explains] its popularity.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน the variety เอกพจน์ (of dishes เป็นส่วนขยาย) → is impressive | are ผิด SVA

writingError.stem: Mathematics (A)[is] often considered difficult, but the news today (B)[are] that more students (C)[are choosing] to study it, which (D)[suggests] attitudes are changing.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน news เป็นนามนับไม่ได้ (เอกพจน์) → the news is that | are ผิด SVA

writingError.stem: The new café quickly became popular; (A)[as a result], queues formed every morning, (B)[and] the owners hired more staff, (C)[despite] customers continued to wait, (D)[which] tested their patience.
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยประโยค (customers continued...) ต้องใช้ yet/but → yet customers continued to wait | despite ตามด้วยนาม/V-ing เท่านั้น (ผิด)

writingError.stem: Solar energy is clean and increasingly affordable; (A)[consequently], its use is spreading, (B)[and] many homes now have panels, (C)[yet] storage remains a challenge, (D)[because] researchers are developing better batteries.
writingError.explanation_th: ตรรกะกลับด้าน (ปัญหาการเก็บพลังงาน จึงพัฒนาแบตเตอรี่) → so researchers are developing | because ทำให้เหตุผลกลับด้าน (ผิดตรรกะ)

writingError.stem: (A)[Surround] by supportive colleagues, the new employee quickly gained confidence, (B)[learning] the systems, (C)[contributing] ideas, and (D)[earning] the respect of the team.
writingError.explanation_th: วลี participle แบบ passive (ถูกรายล้อม) → Surrounded by supportive colleagues | Surround รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V3)

writingError.stem: The festival aims (A)[to celebrate] local culture, (B)[promote] traditional music, (C)[showcasing] regional food, and (D)[bringing] communities together.
writingError.explanation_th: ขนานกับ showcasing/bringing (participle) → promoting traditional music | promote รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V-ing)

writingError.stem: If the company had listened to its engineers, the product (A)[would have been] safer, the recall (B)[could have been] avoided, and its reputation (C)[will not have suffered], but management (D)[ignored] the warnings.
writingError.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 3 (if + had listened) ใช้ would have → would not have suffered | will not have ผิด (ต้องเป็น would ในประโยคสมมุติอดีต)

writingError.stem: Unless we act now, climate change (A)[will worsen], sea levels (B)[will rise], extreme weather (C)[will become] more common, and future generations (D)[would inherit] a damaged planet.
writingError.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 1 (Unless we act) ใช้ will ตลอด → will inherit | would ใช้กับเงื่อนไขสมมุติ (ผิด ต้องสอดคล้องกับ will worsen/will rise)

writingError.stem: The journalist asked the official (A)[when will the new policy take effect], whether it would affect small businesses, and how the public (B)[would be] informed, but received only (C)[vague] answers (D)[in return].
options: (A) when will the new policy take effect
writingError.explanation_th: คำถามซ้อน (indirect) เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผัน → when the new policy would take effect | when will the new policy take effect ผิด (ห้ามผันแบบคำถามตรง)

writingError.stem: The shop window displayed (A)[an elegant leather] handbag, (B)[a red small] umbrella, and (C)[a pair of] designer shoes, attracting (D)[many curious] shoppers.
writingError.explanation_th: ลำดับคำคุณศัพท์: ขนาด (small) มาก่อนสี (red) → a small red umbrella | a red small ผิดลำดับ

writingError.stem: The coach praised the players for (A)[their] effort, telling (B)[them] that the victory belonged to the entire team, and that no one should take more credit than (C)[themselves] deserved, a message (D)[that] united the group.
writingError.explanation_th: เป็นประธานของ deserved ต้องใช้สรรพนามประธาน → than they deserved | themselves เป็น reflexive (ใช้เป็นประธานไม่ได้)

writingError.stem: The new manager introduced (A)[herself] to the staff, encouraged (B)[them] to share their concerns, and assured (C)[everyone] that the company valued (D)[they] greatly.
writingError.explanation_th: เป็นกรรมของ valued ต้องใช้สรรพนามกรรม → valued them greatly | they เป็นประธาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The director insisted on (A)[to follow] the original plan, refused (B)[to make] last-minute changes, and warned against (C)[rushing] the production, fearing (D)[damaging] the final result.
writingError.explanation_th: insist on + V-ing → insisted on following | to follow ผิด (หลัง on ต้องเป็น gerund)

writingError.stem: The students enjoyed (A)[learning] about history, but they disliked (B)[to memorise] long lists of dates, preferring instead (C)[to discuss] ideas and (D)[to explore] different points of view.
writingError.explanation_th: dislike + V-ing → disliked memorising | to memorise ผิด (dislike ตามด้วย gerund)

writingError.stem: The doctor recommended that the patient (A)[rest] for a week, that she (B)[avoid] heavy lifting, that she (C)[takes] her medicine regularly, and that she (D)[return] for a check-up.
writingError.explanation_th: recommend that + ประธาน + กริยาฐาน (subjunctive) → that she take her medicine | takes ผิด (ห้ามเติม -s)

writingError.stem: It is essential that the data (A)[be backed] up daily, that access (B)[be restricted] to authorised staff, that passwords (C)[be changed] regularly, and that any breach (D)[is reported] at once.
writingError.explanation_th: It is essential that + ประธาน + (should) be + V3 (subjunctive) → that any breach be reported | is reported ผิด (ต้องเป็นรูปฐาน be)

writingError.stem: Many students (A)has been waiting (B)for the final exam (C)for more than two months (D)but they still have not received it.
options: (D) but they still have not received it
writingError.explanation_th: many students เป็นประธานพหูพจน์ ต้องใช้ have been waiting ไม่ใช่ has been waiting

writingError.stem: By the time we (A)reach (B)the airport the plane (C)had already (D)left.
writingError.explanation_th: By the time + past = past perfect ใน main clause แต่ถ้า main clause เป็น had already left แล้ว when-clause ต้องเป็น past simple ดังนั้น reach → reached

writingError.stem: She (A)say (B)that she (C)will come (D)to the party tomorrow.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน she ต้องใช้กริยา present simple เอกพจน์ ดังนั้น say → says

writingError.stem: If I (A)had known (B)about the traffic jam, (C)I would take (D)a different route.
writingError.explanation_th: Conditional type 3: if + had + V3 → would have + V3 ดังนั้น would take → would have taken

writingError.stem: The research team (A)begins (B)collecting data last year (C)and has continued (D)ever since.
writingError.explanation_th: last year ใช้ past simple ดังนั้น begins → began

writingError.stem: He (A)is studying (B)for the exam (C)since last month (D)without any break.
writingError.explanation_th: since last month ต้องใช้ present perfect continuous ดังนั้น is studying → has been studying

writingError.stem: The list of popular universities (A)are (B)posted (C)on the board (D)every year.
writingError.explanation_th: subject คือ The list เอกพจน์ ดังนั้น are → is

writingError.stem: Neither of the applicants (A)meet (B)the requirements (C)of the scholarship (D)program.
writingError.explanation_th: Neither เป็นประธานเอกพจน์ ดังนั้น meet → meets

writingError.stem: The number of students (A)who attend (B)private universities (C)have increased (D)significantly over the past decade.
writingError.explanation_th: The number of + noun ใช้กริยาเอกพจน์ ดังนั้น have → has

writingError.stem: The committee (A)consist (B)of five members (C)who are responsible (D)for selecting the finalists.
writingError.explanation_th: The committee เป็นเอกพจน์ ดังนั้น consist → consists

writingError.stem: She spoke (A)angry (B)at the teacher (C)about her (D)incomplete assignment.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายกริยา spoke ต้องใช้ adverb ดังนั้น angry → angrily

writingError.stem: The (A)terrible (B)storm (C)caused serious (D)damaged to the coastal villages.
writingError.explanation_th: caused ตามด้วย noun ดังนั้น damaged → damage

writingError.stem: He (A)wrote (B)a very (C)effectively (D)essay in the competition.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยาย essay ซึ่งเป็น noun ต้องใช้ adjective ดังนั้น effectively → effective

writingError.stem: She studies hard (A)so that (B)she wants (C)to pass (D)the exam with high marks.
writingError.explanation_th: so that ตามด้วย can/will ไม่ใช่ wants ซึ่งเป็นกริยาหลัก ควรใช้ because หรือ since แทน

writingError.stem: He (A)left early (B)beside (C)he wanted to (D)catch the first train.
writingError.explanation_th: beside = อยู่ข้างๆ ไม่ใช่คำเชื่อมเหตุผล ต้องใช้ because ดังนั้น beside → because

writingError.stem: She (A)not only studies hard (B)and (C)she also (D)works part-time.
writingError.explanation_th: not only ต้องคู่กับ but also ดังนั้น and → but also

writingError.stem: The book (A)who (B)I borrowed (C)from the (D)library last week is very interesting.
writingError.explanation_th: antecedent คือ the book สิ่งของ ต้องใช้ which ไม่ใช่ who

writingError.stem: The girl (A)which (B)lives (C)next door (D)is my classmate.
writingError.explanation_th: antecedent คือ the girl บุคคล ต้องใช้ who ไม่ใช่ which

writingError.stem: She avoids (A)to talk (B)in public (C)because (D)she is shy.
writingError.explanation_th: avoid ตามด้วย gerund เสมอ ดังนั้น to talk → talking

writingError.stem: He plans (A)studying (B)abroad (C)after he (D)graduates.
writingError.explanation_th: plan ตามด้วย to-infinitive ดังนั้น studying → to study

writingError.stem: The project (A)are completed (B)by the team (C)last week (D)without any delay.
writingError.explanation_th: The project เอกพจน์ + last week ต้องใช้ past passive ดังนั้น are completed → was completed

writingError.stem: The report (A)was (B)write (C)by the manager (D)last night.
writingError.explanation_th: passive ต้องใช้ past participle ดังนั้น write → written

writingError.stem: All the tickets (A)has been sold (B)before the event (C)began (D)yesterday evening.
writingError.explanation_th: All the tickets พหูพจน์ ดังนั้น has → have

writingError.stem: The proposal (A)was rejected (B)by the committee (C)without (D)seriously consider it.
writingError.explanation_th: without ตามด้วย gerund ดังนั้น seriously consider it → seriously considering it

writingError.stem: If he (A)had studied (B)harder, he (C)would (D)passed the exam.
writingError.explanation_th: Conditional type 3: would have + V3 ดังนั้น would passed → would have passed

writingError.stem: If she (A)would leave (B)earlier, (C)she would (D)arrive on time.
writingError.explanation_th: if-clause ต้องไม่ใช้ would ดังนั้น would leave → left

writingError.stem: If I (A)am you, (B)I (C)would take (D)that opportunity immediately.
writingError.explanation_th: Conditional type 2 unreal present ต้องใช้ were ดังนั้น am → were

writingError.stem: This car is (A)the fastest (B)than (C)any other (D)in the showroom.
writingError.explanation_th: superlative ไม่ใช้ than ดังนั้น the fastest than → the fastest หรือ faster than

writingError.stem: She writes (A)more clearly (B)than (C)her brother (D)do.
writingError.explanation_th: her brother เอกพจน์ ดังนั้น do → does

writingError.stem: This solution is (A)more effective (B)than (C)any other methods (D)that we have tried.
writingError.explanation_th: any other ตามด้วยคำนามเอกพจน์ ดังนั้น methods → method

writingError.stem: The teacher gave (A)to the students (B)the exam (C)papers (D)yesterday.
writingError.explanation_th: ต้องเป็น gave the exam papers to the students ไม่ใช่ gave to the students the exam papers

writingError.stem: Although (A)it was raining (B)but (C)we decided (D)to go hiking.
writingError.explanation_th: although และ but ห้ามใช้ร่วมกัน ต้องลบ but ออก

writingError.stem: By this time next year, she (A)move (B)to a new city (C)for her (D)new job.
writingError.explanation_th: By this time next year ต้องใช้ future perfect ดังนั้น move → will have moved

writingError.stem: The train (A)leave (B)for Bangkok (C)every morning (D)at seven o'clock.
writingError.explanation_th: The train เอกพจน์ ดังนั้น leave → leaves

writingError.stem: When I (A)arrived (B)at the station, the train (C)has already (D)left.
writingError.explanation_th: เมื่อ main clause ใช้ past simple (arrived) เหตุการณ์ที่เกิดก่อนต้องใช้ past perfect ดังนั้น has already left → had already left

writingError.stem: The committee (A)is reviewing (B)the proposal (C)since last week (D)and has not made a decision yet.
options: (D) and has not made a decision yet
writingError.explanation_th: since last week ต้องใช้ present perfect continuous ดังนั้น is reviewing → has been reviewing

writingError.stem: The email (A)has been sent (B)to all employees (C)yesterday, (D)so everyone should be informed.
writingError.explanation_th: yesterday ต้องใช้ past simple ดังนั้น has been sent → was sent

writingError.stem: The new building (A)are being constructed (B)by the company (C)next to the (D)old stadium.
writingError.explanation_th: The new building เอกพจน์ ดังนั้น are → is

writingError.stem: The documents (A)was (B)left (C)on the desk (D)yesterday evening.
writingError.explanation_th: The documents พหูพจน์ ดังนั้น was → were

writingError.stem: The problem (A)is usually solved (B)by the manager (C)without (D)the staff be informed.
writingError.explanation_th: without ตามด้วย gerund ดังนั้น be → being

writingError.stem: The project (A)has been completed (B)by the team (C)before the deadline (D)was announced.
writingError.explanation_th: before the deadline was announced แสดงว่าเหตุการณ์ก่อนหน้า ต้องใช้ past perfect ดังนั้น has been completed → had been completed

writingError.stem: You (A)would feel (B)better (C)if you eat (D)this medicine.
writingError.explanation_th: ถ้าใช้ would ใน main clause ต้องใช้ past tense ใน if-clause ดังนั้น eat → ate

writingError.stem: If I (A)have time, (B)I (C)would help you (D)with your homework.
writingError.explanation_th: ถ้าใช้ would ใน main clause ต้องใช้ past tense ดังนั้น have → had

writingError.stem: They (A)would ran (B)outside (C)if they (D)had seen the accident.
writingError.explanation_th: would ตามด้วย base form เสมอ ดังนั้น ran → run

writingError.stem: She walked (A)quiet (B)through the (C)library (D)so as not to disturb anyone.
options: (D) so as not to disturb anyone
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายกริยา walked ต้องใช้ adverb ดังนั้น quiet → quietly

writingError.stem: The (A)beauty (B)garden (C)attracts many (D)visitors in summer.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยาย garden คำนาม ต้องใช้ adjective ดังนั้น beauty → beautiful

writingError.stem: The decision completely (A)changed (B)my (C)perspective (D)in the issue.
writingError.explanation_th: perspective ใช้ preposition on หรือ about ไม่ใช่ in ดังนั้น in → on

writingError.stem: The project was a huge (A)successful (B)because of the team's (C)unusual (D)effort.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง a/an ต้องใช้ noun ดังนั้น successful → success

writingError.stem: He enjoys (A)to listen (B)to music (C)while he (D)studies.
writingError.explanation_th: enjoy ตามด้วย gerund เสมอ ดังนั้น to listen → listening

writingError.stem: The teacher asked (A)the students (B)turning (C)off their phones (D)during the exam.
writingError.explanation_th: ask + object + to-infinitive ดังนั้น turning → to turn

writingError.stem: The students finished (A)to write (B)their essays (C)just before (D)the class ended.
writingError.explanation_th: finish ตามด้วย gerund เสมอ ดังนั้น to write → writing

writingError.stem: The teacher suggested (A)the students (B)to presenting (C)their projects (D)in groups.
writingError.explanation_th: suggest ตามด้วย gerund หรือ that-clause ดังนั้น to presenting → presenting

writingError.stem: This car is (A)more faster (B)than (C)that one (D)on the right.
writingError.explanation_th: faster เป็น comparative อยู่แล้ว ไม่ต้องมี more ดังนั้น more faster → faster

writingError.stem: He is (A)taller (B)than (C)any other (D)students in the class.
writingError.explanation_th: any other ตามด้วยคำนามเอกพจน์ ดังนั้น students → student

writingError.stem: The climate here is (A)quite (B)different (C)from (D)than in the north.
writingError.explanation_th: different ใช้ from ไม่ใช้ than ดังนั้น from than → from (ลบ than ออก)

writingError.stem: This solution is (A)most effective (B)of (C)any method (D)that we have tried.
writingError.explanation_th: superlative ต้องมี the ดังนั้น most effective → the most effective

writingError.stem: The woman (A)whom (B)gave the speech (C)at the conference (D)is a famous scientist.
writingError.explanation_th: whom เป็น object ต้องใช้ who เพราะตามด้วย verb gave ดังนั้น whom → who

writingError.stem: The book (A)where (B)I found (C)the information (D)is very useful.
writingError.explanation_th: antecedent คือ the book ต้องใช้ which/that ไม่ใช่ where ดังนั้น where → which

writingError.stem: The students (A)which (B)are in the classroom (C)need to (D)return their homework.
writingError.explanation_th: antecedent คือ the students บุคคล ต้องใช้ who ดังนั้น which → who

writingError.stem: She met a man (A)who (B)his name (C)is unknown (D)to everyone.
writingError.explanation_th: ใน relative clause ต้องใช้ whose แทน his ดังนั้น his name → whose name

writingError.stem: If (A)anyone (B)comes to the door, (C)tell they (D)to wait outside.
writingError.explanation_th: they เป็น subject pronoun ต้องใช้ object form ดังนั้น they → them

writingError.stem: The teacher praised (A)Julia and (B)I (C)for our (D)excellent presentation.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง praised (กริยา) ต้องใช้ object pronoun ดังนั้น I → me

writingError.stem: While (A)waiting for the bus, (B)she read (C)a novel (D)to passing the time.
writingError.explanation_th: to ตามด้วย base form ดังนั้น to passing → to pass

writingError.stem: The students (A)were asked (B)to leave the room (C)so they wouldn't (D)made noise.
writingError.explanation_th: wouldn't ตามด้วย base form ดังนั้น made → make

writingError.stem: Because (A)she was tired, (B)she decided (C)go to bed (D)early.
writingError.explanation_th: decide ตามด้วย to-infinitive ดังนั้น go → to go

writingError.stem: She left (A)early (B)because she (C)feeling (D)sick.
writingError.explanation_th: ต้องมี be-verb ดังนั้น feeling → was feeling

writingError.stem: The teacher (A)has explained (B)the lesson (C)yesterday (D)but many students still don't understand.
options: (D) but many students still don't understand
writingError.explanation_th: yesterday ต้องใช้ past simple ดังนั้น has explained → explained

writingError.stem: She (A)is writing (B)her report (C)now (D)for three hours.
writingError.explanation_th: for three hours ต้องใช้ present perfect continuous ดังนั้น is writing → has been writing

writingError.stem: They (A)are discussing (B)the plan (C)since early morning (D)and are still arguing.
writingError.explanation_th: since early morning ต้องใช้ present perfect continuous ดังนั้น are discussing → have been discussing

writingError.stem: The tickets (A)is being sold (B)at the (C)booth (D)outside the stadium.
writingError.explanation_th: The tickets พหูพจน์ ดังนั้น is → are

writingError.stem: The window (A)has been break (B)by the (C)strong wind (D)last night.
writingError.explanation_th: passive ต้องใช้ past participle ดังนั้น break → broken

writingError.stem: The documents (A)are (B)checking (C)by the (D)staff.
writingError.explanation_th: present passive ต้องใช้ past participle ดังนั้น checking → checked

writingError.stem: The house (A)is been painted (B)by the workers (C)while the (D)family is away.
writingError.explanation_th: present continuous passive ต้องเป็น is being painted ดังนั้น is been → is being

writingError.stem: If she (A)studied (B)harder, she (C)would (D)passed the exam.
writingError.explanation_th: Conditional type 3: would + have + V3 ดังนั้น would passed → would have passed

writingError.stem: If I (A)were you, (B)I (C)take (D)that job immediately.
writingError.explanation_th: conditional type 2 ต้องใช้ would + base form ดังนั้น take → would take

writingError.stem: Unless (A)you hurry, (B)you (C)would missed (D)the bus.
writingError.explanation_th: would ตามด้วย base form ดังนั้น missed → miss

writingError.stem: The (A)quick (B)respond (C)from the staff (D)satisfied the customer.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง adjective quick ต้องเป็น noun ดังนั้น respond → response

writingError.stem: He speaks (A)Spanish (B)very (C)good (D)although he has lived there for only a year.
options: (D) although he has lived there for only a year
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายกริยา speaks ต้องใช้ adverb ดังนั้น good → well

writingError.stem: Her (A)performance (B)was very (C)succeed (D)and the audience applauded.
writingError.explanation_th: was ตามด้วย adjective ดังนั้น succeed → successful

writingError.stem: The (A)efficient (B)management (C)led to (D)reduce costs this year.
writingError.explanation_th: led to ตามด้วย noun หรือ gerund ดังนั้น reduce → reduction in

writingError.stem: I like (A)to went (B)swimming (C)in the sea (D)on weekends.
writingError.explanation_th: to ตามด้วย base form ดังนั้น went → go

writingError.stem: He hopes (A)winning (B)the scholarship (C)and (D)studying abroad.
writingError.explanation_th: hope ตามด้วย to-infinitive ดังนั้น winning → to win

writingError.stem: She is looking forward (A)to meet (B)her old friends (C)at the (D)reunion.
writingError.explanation_th: look forward to ตามด้วย gerund ดังนั้น meet → meeting

writingError.stem: The manager suggested (A)him (B)to taking (C)the course (D)next semester.
writingError.explanation_th: suggest ตามด้วย gerund หรือ that-clause ดังนั้น to taking → taking

writingError.stem: This road is (A)wider (B)than (C)any streets (D)in the old town.
writingError.explanation_th: any ตามด้วยเอกพจน์เมื่อเปรียบเทียบ ดังนั้น streets → street

writingError.stem: She is (A)the most (B)experienced (C)than (D)any other candidate.
writingError.explanation_th: the most = superlative ไม่ใช้ than ดังนั้น ลบ than ออก

writingError.stem: He is (A)more taller (B)than (C)his brother (D)by about ten centimeters.
writingError.explanation_th: taller เป็น comparative แล้ว ดังนั้น more taller → taller

writingError.stem: The man (A)who (B)name (C)is unknown (D)to us lives nearby.
writingError.explanation_th: ต้องใช้ whose + noun ดังนั้น who name → whose name

writingError.stem: The students (A)who (B)watch (C)the presentation (D)all wrote notes.
writingError.explanation_th: all wrote เป็น past tense ดังนั้น watch → watched

writingError.stem: Each of the girls (A)must bring (B)their (C)uniform (D)to school.
writingError.explanation_th: Each เอกพจน์ ดังนั้น their → her

writingError.stem: Both Tom and Mary (A)forgot (B)their (C)bag (D)at home.
writingError.explanation_th: both สองคน ต้องใช้ plural noun ดังนั้น bag → bags

writingError.stem: The teacher praised (A)Ben and (B)I (C)for our (D)excellent work.
writingError.explanation_th: หลังกริยา praised ต้องใช้ object pronoun ดังนั้น I → me (The teacher praised Ben and me)

writingError.stem: Because (A)she was late, (B)she hurried (C)get (D)to the meeting.
writingError.explanation_th: hurried ตามด้วย to-infinitive ดังนั้น get → to get

writingError.stem: The teacher asked (A)the students (B)finish (C)the exercise (D)before class ended.
writingError.explanation_th: ask + object + to-infinitive ดังนั้น finish → to finish

writingError.stem: She began (A)to singing (B)a song (C)while she (D)was cooking.
writingError.explanation_th: to ตามด้วย base form ดังนั้น to singing → to sing

writingError.stem: The students enjoy (A)to discuss (B)the topic (C)with the teacher (D)after class.
writingError.explanation_th: enjoy ตามด้วย gerund ดังนั้น to discuss → discussing

writingError.stem: She (A)has been living (B)in Bangkok (C)for five years (D)ago.
writingError.explanation_th: present perfect ไม่ใช้กับ ago ต้องใช้ for five years ดังนั้น ลบ ago ออก

writingError.stem: When I (A)open (B)the door, I (C)saw (D)a familiar face.
writingError.explanation_th: main clause ใช้ saw ต้องใช้ past tense ใน when-clause ดังนั้น open → opened

writingError.stem: The tickets (A)are being selling (B)at the (C)booth (D)outside the cinema.
writingError.explanation_th: present continuous passive ต้องใช้ being + past participle ดังนั้น selling → sold

writingError.stem: The report (A)was (B)write (C)by the assistant (D)yesterday.
writingError.explanation_th: passive ต้องใช้ past participle ดังนั้น write → written

writingError.stem: The house (A)is build (B)by the construction (C)company (D)next year.
writingError.explanation_th: passive + future ต้องใช้ will be built ดังนั้น is build → will be built

writingError.stem: The error (A)could be avoided (B)if the teacher (C)have checked (D)the answers carefully.
writingError.explanation_th: conditional type 3 if-clause ต้องใช้ past perfect ดังนั้น have checked → had checked

writingError.stem: The project (A)has been (B)completing (C)by the team (D)for weeks.
writingError.explanation_th: present perfect passive ต้องใช้ past participle ดังนั้น completing → completed

writingError.stem: The proposal (A)was being (B)discussing (C)by the committee (D)when the chairman arrived.
writingError.explanation_th: past continuous passive ต้องใช้ past participle ดังนั้น discussing → discussed

writingError.stem: If he (A)had studied (B)harder, he (C)would succeeded (D)the exam.
writingError.explanation_th: would ตามด้วย base form ดังนั้น succeeded → succeed

writingError.stem: If she (A)comes (B)early, she (C)would get (D)a good seat.
writingError.explanation_th: if-clause ใช้ present simple ดังนั้น main clause ต้องใช้ will ดังนั้น would → will

writingError.stem: She (A)would have (B)accept (C)the job (D)if the salary had been higher.
options: (D) if the salary had been higher
writingError.explanation_th: would have ตามด้วย past participle ดังนั้น accept → accepted

writingError.stem: The (A)careful (B)choose (C)of the candidates (D)impressed the committee.
writingError.explanation_th: ต้องใช้ noun ดังนั้น choose → choice

writingError.stem: He spoke (A)very (B)slow (C)so that (D)everyone could understand.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายกริยา spoke ต้องใช้ adverb ดังนั้น slow → slowly

writingError.stem: I like (A)to went (B)skiing (C)in the mountains (D)every winter.
writingError.explanation_th: to ตามด้วย base form ดังนั้น went → go

writingError.stem: He hopes (A)winning (B)the match (C)and (D)traveling around the world.
writingError.explanation_th: hope ตามด้วย to-infinitive ดังนั้น winning → to win

writingError.stem: She is looking forward (A)to meet (B)her relatives (C)at the (D)airport.
writingError.explanation_th: look forward to ตามด้วย gerund ดังนั้น meet → meeting

writingError.stem: The manager suggested (A)the employees (B)to taking (C)a short break (D)before the meeting.
writingError.explanation_th: suggest ตามด้วย gerund ดังนั้น to taking → taking

writingError.stem: This car is (A)faster (B)than any other (C)cars (D)on the road.
writingError.explanation_th: any other ตามด้วยเอกพจน์ ดังนั้น cars → car

writingError.stem: He is (A)more stronger (B)than (C)his brother (D)by several centimeters.
writingError.explanation_th: stronger เป็น comparative แล้ว ดังนั้น more stronger → stronger

writingError.stem: This is (A)the most (B)expensive hotel (C)than (D)any other in the city.
writingError.explanation_th: the most = superlative ไม่ใช้ than ดังนั้น ลบ than ออก

writingError.stem: Each of the players (A)are (B)responsible (C)for their own (D)equipment.
writingError.explanation_th: Each เป็นเอกพจน์ ดังนั้น are → is

writingError.stem: There (A)was (B)several problems (C)with the (D)new system.
writingError.explanation_th: several problems พหูพจน์ ดังนั้น was → were

writingError.stem: The team (A)have (B)won five (C)matches (D)this season.
writingError.explanation_th: The team เอกพจน์ในบริบท competition ดังนั้น have → has

writingError.stem: The news (A)about the (B)two earthquakes (C)were (D)shocking.
writingError.explanation_th: news เป็น uncountable เอกพจน์ ดังนั้น were → was

writingError.stem: Neither the students (A)nor the teacher (B)were (C)aware of the (D)schedule change.
writingError.explanation_th: neither...nor ใช้กริยาตาม subject ที่อยู่ใกล้ที่สุด = the teacher เอกพจน์ ดังนั้น were → was

writingError.stem: She wants to become (A)a (B)honest (C)scientist (D)in the future.
writingError.explanation_th: หน้าคำที่ขึ้นต้นด้วยเสียงสระ ต้องใช้ an ดังนั้น a honest → an honest

writingError.stem: She plays (A)the (B)piano (C)very well (D)in Monday evenings.
writingError.explanation_th: วันในสัปดาห์ต้องใช้ preposition on ไม่ใช่ in ดังนั้น in Monday evenings → on Monday evenings

writingError.stem: The man (A)in black coat (B)is my uncle (C)who lives (D)in the countryside.
writingError.explanation_th: ต้องมี article หน้า coat ดังนั้น in black coat → in a black coat

writingError.stem: He is (A)the best (B)student in (C)a class (D)of thirty.
writingError.explanation_th: เมื่อพูดถึง class เฉพาะของเขา ต้องใช้ the ดังนั้น a → the

writingError.stem: Everyone in the office (A)must submit (B)their (C)report (D)by Friday.
writingError.explanation_th: Everyone เอกพจน์ ดังนั้น their → his or her

writingError.stem: She put (A)on the table (B)the book (C)that she (D)bought yesterday.
writingError.explanation_th: ต้องเป็น put the book on the table ดังนั้น word order ผิด

writingError.stem: Never (A)have I (B)seen such (C)a beautiful scenery (D)before.
writingError.explanation_th: scenery เป็น uncountable ไม่ใช้ a ดังนั้น a beautiful scenery → such beautiful scenery

writingError.stem: The movie (A)was so (B)boring (C)despite (D)I enjoyed the ending.
writingError.explanation_th: despite ตามด้วย noun/gerund ไม่ใช่ clause ดังนั้น despite → although

writingError.stem: Having (A)finished his work (B)the manager (C)dismissed (D)early.
writingError.explanation_th: dismissed เป็น passive แต่ประธาน the manager ทำการเอง ต้องใช้ was dismissed หรือ left ดังนั้น dismissed → left

writingError.stem: She is looking forward (A)to see (B)her parents (C)next (D)week.
writingError.explanation_th: look forward to + gerund เสมอ ดังนั้น to see → seeing (She is looking forward to seeing her parents)

writingError.stem: We agreed (A)to meeting (B)at the cafe (C)after (D)class.
writingError.explanation_th: agree ตามด้วย to-infinitive ดังนั้น to meeting → to meet

writingError.stem: The doctor recommended (A)him (B)to rest (C)for at least (D)two weeks.
writingError.explanation_th: recommend ตามด้วย gerund หรือ that-clause ไม่ใช้ object + to-inf ดังนั้น to rest → resting

writingError.stem: The teacher insists that every student (A)brings (B)a pencil (C)to (D)class.
writingError.explanation_th: insist that + bare infinitive (subjunctive) ดังนั้น brings → bring

writingError.stem: It is important that he (A)is (B)present at (C)the meeting (D)tomorrow.
writingError.explanation_th: It is important that + bare infinitive ดังนั้น is → be

writingError.stem: If I (A)will have (B)enough money, (C)I would buy (D)a new car.
writingError.explanation_th: if-clause ของ conditional ต้องไม่ใช้ will ดังนั้น will have → had

writingSC.stem: The new manager is known for her honesty, her dedication, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ต้องขนานกับ 'her honesty, her dedication' (her + นาม) → her ability to inspire others | ตัวเลือกอื่นเป็นประโยค/รูปต่างกัน ไม่ขนาน

writingSC.stem: Seldom __________ such a beautiful sunset over the mountains.
writingSC.explanation_th: Seldom (negative adverb) ขึ้นต้นประโยค ต้องผัน aux มาก่อนประธาน → have we seen | we have seen ไม่ผัน, อื่น ๆ เรียง/รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The novel, __________, has been translated into more than thirty languages.
writingSC.explanation_th: อนุประโยคขยาย the novel แบบ non-restrictive หลัง comma → which was written in 1980 | it was... เป็นประโยคเอกเทศ, that ใช้ non-restrictive ไม่ได้, อื่นรูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The researchers could not explain __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause หลัง explain เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผันแบบคำถาม → why the results varied | why did the results vary ผิด (ผันแบบคำถาม), อื่นเรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: __________, the firefighters rushed into the burning building to rescue the trapped residents.
writingSC.explanation_th: วลี participle ขึ้นต้นขยายประธาน (the firefighters) → Risking their lives | They risked... เป็นประโยคเอกเทศ, อื่นรูปผิด

writingSC.stem: __________, you must first understand the needs of your customers.
writingSC.explanation_th: วลี infinitive บอกจุดประสงค์ขึ้นต้นประโยค → To succeed in business, you must... | Succeeding... สื่อความ/ห้อยผิด, อื่นเป็นนาม

writingSC.stem: __________ requires patience, discipline, and consistent effort.
options: To learn a new language is
When you learn a new language
writingSC.explanation_th: ประธานของประโยคเป็น gerund phrase → Learning a new language requires... | To learn...is ซ้ำกริยา, When... เป็นอนุประโยค (เป็นประธานไม่ได้), อื่นเรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: The committee developed a detailed plan __________ the city's traffic problems.
writingSC.explanation_th: a plan for + V-ing = แผนสำหรับการ... → for solving | to solving ผิด (to + V), for solve / solve รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The factory installed new filters to reduce pollution; __________, air quality in the area improved significantly.
writingSC.explanation_th: เหตุ-ผล (ติดตั้งตัวกรอง → อากาศดีขึ้น) → as a result | however/nevertheless/on the other hand = ขัดแย้ง (ผิดความหมาย)

writingSC.stem: The interviewer asked the candidate __________ in five years.
writingSC.explanation_th: คำถามซ้อนหลัง asked เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผัน → where she saw herself | where did she see ผิด, อื่นเรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ in 1889, the Eiffel Tower has become one of the most visited monuments in the world.
writingSC.explanation_th: ลดรูปแบบ passive (which was completed) → Completed in 1889 | Completing เป็น active (หอคอยไม่ได้สร้างเอง), อื่นรูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The more carefully you plan your project, __________.
options: the better your results will be
writingSC.explanation_th: โครงสร้าง The more..., the + comparative... → the better your results will be | อื่นไม่เข้าคู่ the...the / เรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: If the company had invested in research earlier, it __________ a market leader.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 3 (if + had invested) ผลลัพธ์ใช้ would have + V3 → would have become | will have become/had become/would be becoming รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: Not until she received the official letter __________ that she had won the scholarship.
writingSC.explanation_th: Not until... ขึ้นต้น ต้องผัน aux มาก่อนประธานในประโยคหลัก → did she realize | she realized ไม่ผัน, อื่นเรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: The town __________ has become a popular tourist destination.
options: where we spent our holidays in
writingSC.explanation_th: ขยายสถานที่ (the town) ใช้ where → where we spent our holidays | which/that ขาดบุพบท in, ส่วน where...in ซ้ำซ้อน

writingSC.stem: During the workshop, the students learned how to analyze data, how to present findings, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ต้องขนานกับ 'how to analyze..., how to present...' → how to write reports | อื่นรูปไม่ขนาน

writingSC.stem: __________ remains a mystery to scientists even today.
options: How the ancient pyramids were built
How were the ancient pyramids built
How did the ancient pyramids get built
How are the ancient pyramids built
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause ทำหน้าที่ประธาน เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผัน → How the ancient pyramids were built remains... | How were... ผิด (ผันแบบคำถาม), อื่นเรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ that motivates employees the most, according to recent studies.
writingSC.explanation_th: ประโยคเน้น cleft: It is + ส่วนที่เน้น + that... → It is recognition that motivates... | อื่นไม่เข้ารูป cleft / เรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: The hikers reached the summit at dawn, __________ over the distant valleys.
writingSC.explanation_th: วลี participle แสดงเหตุการณ์พร้อมกัน ต่อท้ายประโยคหลัก → watching the sunrise | they watched... ทำให้เป็น comma splice, อื่นรูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The list of items that customers frequently return __________ by the quality team every month.
writingSC.explanation_th: ประธานคือ The list (เอกพจน์; of items...เป็นส่วนขยาย) + passive → is reviewed | are being reviewed ผิด SVA, have been reviewing เป็น active, review รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The volunteers spent the weekend cleaning the park, planting trees, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขนานกับ cleaning/planting (V-ing) → repairing the fence | อื่นรูปไม่ขนาน

writingSC.stem: Never before __________ so many people at the festival.
writingSC.explanation_th: Never before (negative) ขึ้นต้น → ผัน aux: have we seen | อื่นไม่ผัน/รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The musician, __________, will perform tonight.
writingSC.explanation_th: whose + นาม (album) แสดงความเป็นเจ้าของ → whose album topped the charts | อื่นใช้คำเชื่อมผิด

writingSC.stem: I can't remember __________.
options: where did I put my keys
where do I put my keys
where have I put my keys
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause หลัง remember เรียงประธาน+กริยา → where I put my keys | where did I put ผิด (ผันคำถาม)

writingSC.stem: __________, the tourists took hundreds of photos.
options: They were amazed by the scenery
writingSC.explanation_th: past participle ขึ้นต้นขยายประธาน (นักท่องเที่ยวรู้สึกทึ่ง) → Amazed by the scenery | Amazing = ผู้ทำให้ทึ่ง (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: She stayed up all night __________ for the final exam.
writingSC.explanation_th: infinitive บอกจุดประสงค์ (เพื่อ...) → to prepare | for preparing/prepare/prepared รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ without warming up can cause injury.
writingSC.explanation_th: gerund phrase เป็นประธาน → Exercising vigorously | To exercising ผิดรูป, When... เป็นอนุประโยค

writingSC.stem: He apologized __________ late to the meeting.
writingSC.explanation_th: apologize for + V-ing → for arriving | to arrive/for arrive รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The software is powerful; __________, it is difficult for beginners to use.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขัดแย้ง (ทรงพลังแต่ใช้ยาก) → however | therefore/as a result = เหตุผล (ผิดความหมาย)

writingSC.stem: Do you know __________?
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงประธาน+กริยา → when the museum opens | when does... ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ the lecture, the students asked many questions.
writingSC.explanation_th: ลดรูป adverbial: After + V-ing → After hearing | After heard/They heard รูป/โครงสร้างผิด

writingSC.stem: Traffic today is __________ it was yesterday.
writingSC.explanation_th: comparative + than → much worse than | worse as/more worse/the worst ผิดรูปเปรียบเทียบ

writingSC.stem: If we __________ earlier, we would have caught the train.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 3: if + had + V3 → had left | อื่นผิด tense

writingSC.stem: __________ his patience that makes him a great teacher.
writingSC.explanation_th: it-cleft เน้น: It is + ส่วนเน้น + that → It is his patience that... | อื่นไม่เข้ารูป cleft

writingSC.stem: Each of the proposals __________ carefully before approval.
writingSC.explanation_th: Each of + พหูพจน์ ใช้กริยาเอกพจน์ → is reviewed | are reviewed ผิด SVA

writingSC.stem: Only when the lights went out __________ how late it was.
writingSC.explanation_th: Only when... ขึ้นต้น ผัน aux ในประโยคหลัก → did we realize | we realized ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: The village __________ has beautiful old temples.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขยายสถานที่ (village) ตามด้วยประโยคสมบูรณ์ → where my grandparents live | which/that ขาดบุพบท

writingSC.stem: __________ is still unclear to investigators.
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause เป็นประธาน เรียงประธาน+กริยา → How the fire started | How did... ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ harder, she might have won the scholarship.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 3 แบบกลับรูป (ตัด if): Had + ประธาน + V3 → Had she studied | อื่นผิดรูป/กลับรูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The package __________ this morning contained a surprise gift.
writingSC.explanation_th: past participle ลดรูป (which was delivered) → delivered | delivering = active (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: Seldom __________ such dedication in a young employee.
writingSC.explanation_th: Seldom ขึ้นต้น (negative) → ผัน: do we encounter | we encounter ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: A good leader listens carefully, communicates clearly, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขนานกับ listens/communicates (V ปัจจุบัน) → acts decisively | อื่นรูปไม่ขนาน

writingSC.stem: The laptop __________ broke down after a week.
options: which I bought it last month
writingSC.explanation_th: relative clause ขยาย laptop (สิ่งของ-กรรม) ใช้ that/which → that I bought last month | what/who ใช้ผิด, which...it มี it ซ้ำ

writingSC.stem: Whether __________ depends on the weather.
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause ขึ้นต้นด้วย whether เป็นประธาน เรียงปกติ → (Whether) we go camping | อื่นเรียง/รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ for hours, the climbers finally reached the top.
writingSC.explanation_th: perfect participle (การกระทำก่อนหน้า) → Having hiked | Hiked/They hiked รูป/โครงสร้างผิด

writingSC.stem: This water is not safe __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: adj + to + V → safe to drink | drink/drinking/drunk รูปผิด ไม่เข้าโครงสร้าง adj + to-V

writingSC.stem: Would you mind __________ the window?
writingSC.explanation_th: mind + V-ing → opening | to open ผิด (mind ตามด้วย gerund)

writingSC.stem: She is responsible __________ the new marketing campaign.
writingSC.explanation_th: responsible for + V-ing → for managing | to manage/for manage รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: He had little experience; __________, he was offered the job.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขัดแย้ง (ไม่มีประสบการณ์แต่ได้งาน) → nonetheless | therefore/thus/as a result = เหตุผล (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: Please let me know __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงปกติ → how much it will cost | how much will it cost ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ in simple language, the manual is easy to understand.
writingSC.explanation_th: past participle ลดรูป passive (which is written) → Written | Writing = active (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: The second movie was __________ the first one.
writingSC.explanation_th: comparative + than → even more exciting than | as/the most/เรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: If you heat ice, it __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: zero conditional (ข้อเท็จจริง): if + present, present → melts | will/would/melted ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ the manager who approved the budget, not the director.
writingSC.explanation_th: it-cleft อดีต: It was + ส่วนเน้น + who → It was the manager who... | อื่นไม่เข้ารูป

writingSC.stem: The committee __________ on the proposal next week.
writingSC.explanation_th: committee (กลุ่มเป็นหน่วยเดียว) ใช้เอกพจน์ → is going to vote | are going to vote ผิด SVA

writingSC.stem: So rarely __________ on time that we were shocked when he did.
writingSC.explanation_th: So rarely (negative) ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: does he arrive | he arrives ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: I'd like to know __________.
options: why did the project get delayed
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงปกติ → why the project was delayed | why was... ผิด

writingSC.stem: No other planet in our solar system is __________ Jupiter.
writingSC.explanation_th: as + adj + as เปรียบเท่ากัน → as large as | so large than/as large than ผิดโครงสร้าง

writingSC.stem: After __________ the report, she took a short break.
writingSC.explanation_th: after (บุพบท) + V-ing → finishing | to finish/finish ผิดหลังบุพบท

writingSC.stem: The teacher gave us extra time __________ the essay.
writingSC.explanation_th: infinitive ขยายนาม → (extra) time to complete | complete/completing/completed รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: Can you explain __________?
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause เรียงปกติ → how this machine works | how does... ผิด

writingSC.stem: Not only __________ the deadline, but they also improved the design.
writingSC.explanation_th: Not only ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: did they meet | they met ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: The course teaches students to think critically, to write clearly, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขนานกับ to think/to write (to + V) → to speak confidently | อื่นรูปไม่ขนาน

writingSC.stem: The woman __________ is a famous architect.
writingSC.explanation_th: whose + นาม → whose designs won awards | อื่นใช้คำเชื่อมผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ what to say, he remained silent.
writingSC.explanation_th: present participle เชิงปฏิเสธ → Not knowing | Not known = passive (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: He is too young __________ a driving license.
writingSC.explanation_th: too + adj + to + V → too young to get | for getting/getting ผิด

writingSC.stem: I can't help __________ when I watch that movie.
writingSC.explanation_th: can't help + V-ing → crying | to cry ผิด

writingSC.stem: There is little chance __________ him at this hour.
writingSC.explanation_th: chance of + V-ing (โอกาส/ความเป็นไปได้) → of finding | in finding/for find/finding รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: She was exhausted; __________, she finished the marathon.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขัดแย้ง → even so | therefore/consequently = เหตุผล (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: I'm not sure __________.
options: what will the meeting be about
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงปกติ → what the meeting is about | what is... ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ with fresh ingredients, the dish tasted amazing.
writingSC.explanation_th: past participle ลดรูป passive (which was prepared) → Prepared with fresh ingredients | Preparing = active (อาหารไม่ได้ทำเอง-ผิด), It prepared = ประโยคเอกเทศ, To prepare รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The more you practice, __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: The more..., the + comparative → the more confident you become | อื่นไม่เข้าคู่ the...the

writingSC.stem: If I had known about the meeting, I __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 3: would have + V3 → would have attended | อื่นผิด tense

writingSC.stem: __________ the team needs is a clear strategy.
writingSC.explanation_th: wh-cleft: What + ประโยค + is... → What the team needs is... | That/Which/It ไม่เข้ารูป

writingSC.stem: Neither the teacher nor the students __________ satisfied with the result.
writingSC.explanation_th: neither...nor ใช้กริยาตามประธานที่ใกล้ (students=พหูพจน์) → were | was/is ผิด SVA

writingSC.stem: Under no circumstances __________ the door unlocked.
writingSC.explanation_th: Under no circumstances (negative) ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: should you leave | you should leave ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: Thank you __________ me with the project.
writingSC.explanation_th: thank you for + V-ing → for helping | to help/for help ผิด

writingSC.stem: We can take the train; __________, we can drive.
writingSC.explanation_th: เสนอทางเลือก → alternatively | therefore/as a result = เหตุผล (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: His explanation was __________ I had expected.
writingSC.explanation_th: comparative + than → clearer than | clearer as/more clearer ผิดรูป

writingSC.stem: Nobody told me __________.
options: where do I find the manager
writingSC.explanation_th: where + to + V (embedded) → where to find the manager | อื่นเรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ by the loud thunder, the dog hid under the bed.
writingSC.explanation_th: past participle (สุนัขถูกทำให้กลัว) → Frightened | Frightening = ผู้ทำให้กลัว (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: Little __________ that his life was about to change.
writingSC.explanation_th: Little (negative) ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: did he know | he knew ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: The hotel __________ had an amazing ocean view.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขยายสถานที่ → where we stayed | which/that ขาดบุพบท

writingSC.stem: It is uncertain __________.
options: whether will the flight be delayed
whether the flight will be delayed
whether did the flight get delayed
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause หลัง it...whether เรียงปกติ → whether the flight will be delayed | อื่นเรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ any problems, contact our support team.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขกลับรูป (ตัด if): Should + ประธาน + V → Should you have | อื่นรูป/กลับรูปผิด

writingSC.stem: She moved to London __________ her career.
writingSC.explanation_th: infinitive บอกจุดประสงค์ → to advance | for advancing/advance/advanced รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: He admitted __________ the vase.
writingSC.explanation_th: admit + V-ing → breaking | to break ผิด

writingSC.stem: I'm interested __________ more about ancient history.
writingSC.explanation_th: interested in + V-ing → in learning | for learning/of learning/in learn ผิด (interested ใช้ in + V-ing)

writingSC.stem: The road was icy; __________, we drove very slowly.
writingSC.explanation_th: เหตุ-ผล (ถนนลื่น → ขับช้า) → therefore | however/nevertheless = ขัดแย้ง (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: She asked me __________.
options: whether had I finished the task
whether I had finished the task
whether did I finish the task
writingSC.explanation_th: reported question เรียงปกติ → whether I had finished the task | อื่นเรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ his keys, he had to climb through the window.
writingSC.explanation_th: perfect participle (เหตุก่อนหน้า) → Having lost | Lost = ผิด, He lost = comma splice

writingSC.stem: This bridge is __________ in the country.
writingSC.explanation_th: superlative + in → the longest | the longer/longest ไม่มี the/รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: The news about the layoffs __________ everyone.
writingSC.explanation_th: news (เอกพจน์เสมอ) → has shocked | have shocked ผิด SVA

writingSC.stem: __________ in 1969 that humans first walked on the Moon.
writingSC.explanation_th: it-cleft อดีต เน้นเวลา → It was in 1969 that... | It is ผิด tense/อื่นไม่เข้ารูป

writingSC.stem: Success depends on hard work, good planning, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขนานกับนามวลี (hard work, good planning) → a bit of luck | อื่นไม่ใช่นามวลี

writingSC.stem: Rarely __________ such a talented group of students.
writingSC.explanation_th: Rarely (negative) ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: have I taught | I have taught ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: The book, __________, became an instant bestseller.
writingSC.explanation_th: non-restrictive (หลัง ,) ใช้ which → which was published last year | it/who ขาดคำเชื่อมหรือใช้ผิด, that ใช้หลัง , ไม่ได้

writingSC.stem: Do you have any idea __________?
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงปกติ → what time it is | what time is it ผิด

writingSC.stem: The children sat quietly, __________ to the storyteller.
writingSC.explanation_th: present participle แสดงพร้อมกัน → listening | they listened = comma splice

writingSC.stem: If the weather __________ nice tomorrow, we'll go to the beach.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 1: if + present, will → is | will be/were/would be ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ the rising costs that forced the company to close.
writingSC.explanation_th: it-cleft อดีต → It was the rising costs that... | It is ผิด tense

writingSC.stem: Mathematics __________ my favourite subject at school.
writingSC.explanation_th: Mathematics (เอกพจน์) → has always been | have always been ผิด SVA

writingSC.stem: Hardly __________ the office when the phone rang.
writingSC.explanation_th: Hardly (negative) ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: had I entered | I had entered ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: The new policy aims to reduce waste, save energy, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขนานกับ reduce/save (bare V) → lower costs | อื่นรูปไม่ขนาน

writingSC.stem: The candidates __________ were invited to a second interview.
writingSC.explanation_th: relative clause ขยายคน (ประธาน) ใช้ who → who performed best | which/whom ใช้ผิด, they ขาดคำเชื่อม(relativizer)

writingSC.stem: We need a quiet room __________ the interviews.
writingSC.explanation_th: infinitive ขยายนาม → a room to conduct | conduct/conducting/conducted รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: She is considering __________ her own business.
writingSC.explanation_th: consider + V-ing → starting | to start ผิด

writingSC.stem: He insisted __________ for the meal himself.
writingSC.explanation_th: insist on + V-ing → on paying | to pay/on pay ผิด

writingSC.stem: The project was over budget; __________, it was completed on time.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขัดแย้ง → nevertheless | therefore/thus = เหตุผล (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: I have no idea __________.
options: how did they solve the problem
how do they solve the problem
how will they solve the problem
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงปกติ → how they solved the problem | how did... ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ carefully, the instructions are easy to follow.
writingSC.explanation_th: past participle ลดรูป passive (when they are read) → Read | Reading = active (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: Her new novel is __________ her previous one.
writingSC.explanation_th: comparative + than → far more interesting than | as/เรียงผิด/the most ผิด

writingSC.stem: If he __________ the truth, he would be very upset.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 2 (สมมติปัจจุบัน): if + past, would → knew | knows/had known ผิด tense

writingSC.stem: __________ won the award was kept secret until the ceremony.
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause เป็นประธาน ใช้ who (ประธานของ won) → Who won the award... | Whom/Which/That ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ the email, she immediately called her boss.
writingSC.explanation_th: perfect participle (อ่านก่อนแล้วโทร) → Having read | Read = ผิด, She read = comma splice

writingSC.stem: At no time __________ aware of the danger.
writingSC.explanation_th: At no time (negative) ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: were they | they were ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: The exam was __________ everyone had expected.
writingSC.explanation_th: comparative + than → harder than | harder as/more harder ผิดรูป

writingSC.stem: Instead of __________, he stayed home and studied.
writingSC.explanation_th: instead of (บุพบท) + V-ing → going out | to go out ผิด

writingSC.stem: First, mix the flour and sugar; __________, add the eggs.
writingSC.explanation_th: ลำดับขั้นตอน → then | however/nevertheless = ขัดแย้ง (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: Could you tell me __________?
options: how can I get to the airport
how do I get to the airport
how should I get to the airport
how I can get to the airport
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงปกติ → how I can get to the airport | how can I... ผิด

writingSC.stem: If you mix red and blue, you __________ purple.
writingSC.explanation_th: zero conditional (ข้อเท็จจริง): if + present, present → get | will/would/got ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ surprised me was how calm she stayed.
writingSC.explanation_th: wh-cleft: What + ประโยค → What surprised me was... | That/Which/It ไม่เข้ารูป

writingSC.stem: Scarcely __________ asleep when the alarm went off.
writingSC.explanation_th: Scarcely (negative) ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: had she fallen | she had fallen ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: A balanced lifestyle means eating well, sleeping enough, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขนานกับ eating/sleeping (V-ing) → exercising regularly | อื่นรูปไม่ขนาน

writingSC.stem: The painting __________ was stolen last night.
writingSC.explanation_th: relative clause ขยาย painting (สิ่งของ-ประธาน) ใช้ that/which → that hangs in the gallery | what/who ใช้ผิด, it ขาดคำเชื่อม

writingSC.stem: The manager asked the team __________ the report by Friday.
writingSC.explanation_th: ask + กรรม + to + V → to submit | submitting/submit ผิด

writingSC.stem: She avoided __________ eye contact during the interview.
writingSC.explanation_th: avoid + V-ing → making | to make ผิด

writingSC.stem: Congratulations __________ your new job!
writingSC.explanation_th: congratulations on + V-ing → on getting | to get/on get ผิด

writingSC.stem: He didn't study at all; __________, he failed the test.
writingSC.explanation_th: เหตุ-ผล → as a result | however/nevertheless = ขัดแย้ง (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: I can't decide __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: which + นาม + to + V → which dress to buy | อื่นเรียงผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ from space, the Earth looks blue.
writingSC.explanation_th: past participle ลดรูป passive (when it is seen) → Seen | Seeing = active (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: Nothing is __________ a good night's sleep.
writingSC.explanation_th: as + adj + as → as refreshing as | so/than ผิดโครงสร้าง

writingSC.stem: The list of approved suppliers __________ on the website.
writingSC.explanation_th: ประธาน the list (เอกพจน์) → is published | are published ผิด SVA

writingSC.stem: Please tell me __________.
options: what would you like to order
what do you like to order
what you would like to order
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงปกติ → what you would like to order | what would you... ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ in the morning sun, the lake looked golden.
writingSC.explanation_th: present participle (ทะเลสาบส่องประกาย-active) → Glittering | Glittered = passive (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: Only then __________ how much she had sacrificed.
writingSC.explanation_th: Only then ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: did we understand | we understood ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: I'll never forget the day __________.
options: that we first met on it
writingSC.explanation_th: ขยายเวลา (day) → when we first met | which ขาดบุพบท, อื่นผิด

writingSC.stem: Unless you __________ now, you'll miss the bus.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 1 (unless + present): leave | will leave/left ผิด

writingSC.stem: The question is __________.
options: whether are we able to afford it
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause เป็นส่วนเติมเต็ม เรียงปกติ → whether we can afford it | whether can we... ผิด

writingSC.stem: Twenty kilometres __________ a long way to walk in one day.
writingSC.explanation_th: ระยะทาง/จำนวนรวมถือเป็นหน่วยเดียว → is | are/were ผิด SVA

writingSC.stem: __________ the test, the students felt relieved.
writingSC.explanation_th: perfect participle → Having finished | Finished/They finished ผิด/comma splice

writingSC.stem: Not a single word __________ during the entire meeting.
writingSC.explanation_th: Not a single word (negative ขึ้นต้น) → ผัน: did he say | he said ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: The brochure describes the hotel as comfortable, modern, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขนานกับ adjective (comfortable, modern) → affordable | อื่นไม่ใช่ adj

writingSC.stem: The reason __________ is still unknown.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขยายเหตุผล (reason) → why he resigned | which/what ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ he passed the exam amazed his teachers.
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause นำด้วย That (ข้อเท็จจริง) เป็นประธาน → That he passed... | What/Which ผิด

writingSC.stem: She was delighted __________ the good news.
writingSC.explanation_th: adj + to + V (ปฏิกิริยา) → delighted to hear | hearing/for hearing ผิด

writingSC.stem: Do you feel like __________ out for dinner tonight?
writingSC.explanation_th: feel like + V-ing → going | to go ผิด

writingSC.stem: He is not capable __________ such a big team alone.
writingSC.explanation_th: capable of + V-ing → of managing | to manage/of manage ผิด

writingSC.stem: Tickets sold out within minutes; __________, many fans were disappointed.
writingSC.explanation_th: เหตุ-ผล → consequently | however/nevertheless = ขัดแย้ง (ผิด)

options: why did she leave so early
why does she leave so early
why has she left so early
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงปกติ → why she left so early | why did she... ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ with great care, the antique survived the move.
writingSC.explanation_th: past participle ลดรูป passive (as it was packed) → Packed | Packing = active (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: The traffic in this city is __________ in any other I've visited.
writingSC.explanation_th: comparative + than → worse than | worse as/more worse/the worst ผิดรูป

writingSC.stem: If I were you, I __________ that offer immediately.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 2 (If I were you): would + V → would accept | will/would have accepted ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ matters most is your health, not your wealth.
writingSC.explanation_th: wh-cleft: What + ประโยค → What matters most is... | That/It/Which ไม่เข้ารูป

writingSC.stem: Either the students or the teacher __________ mistaken about the date.
writingSC.explanation_th: either...or ตามประธานที่ใกล้ (the teacher=เอกพจน์) → is | are/were ผิด SVA

writingSC.stem: So determined __________ that she trained every single day.
writingSC.explanation_th: So + adj ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: was she | she was ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: The film was __________ the book it was based on.
writingSC.explanation_th: as + adj + as (เน้น nowhere near) → nowhere near as good as | than ผิดโครงสร้าง

writingSC.stem: There's no use __________ over spilt milk.
writingSC.explanation_th: there's no use + V-ing → crying | to cry ผิด

writingSC.stem: You should back up your files; __________, you might lose them.
writingSC.explanation_th: มิฉะนั้น (ผลเสียถ้าไม่ทำ) → otherwise | therefore/moreover ผิดความหมาย

writingSC.stem: The company __________ has relocated overseas.
writingSC.explanation_th: ต้องมีบุพบทนำ for + which → for which I worked | which I worked ขาด for, that I worked for it มี it ซ้ำ, for that ใช้ for+that ไม่ได้

writingSC.stem: Nowhere __________ such friendly people as in this town.
writingSC.explanation_th: Nowhere (negative ขึ้นต้น) → ผัน: have I met | I have met ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: Good writing is clear, concise, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขนานกับ adj (clear, concise) → well structured | อื่นไม่ใช่ adj

writingSC.stem: The doctor, __________, has won several awards.
writingSC.explanation_th: non-restrictive (หลัง ,) ขยายคน ใช้ who → who treated my mother | which ใช้กับคนไม่ได้, whom เป็นกรรม(นี่เป็นประธาน), that ใช้หลัง , ไม่ได้

writingSC.stem: __________ the company will survive depends on next quarter's sales.
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause เป็นประธาน (ความไม่แน่นอน) ใช้ Whether → Whether the company will survive... | That/What/If ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ in a hurry, she forgot her umbrella.
writingSC.explanation_th: present participle (ขณะรีบออก-active) → Leaving | Left = passive (ผิด), She left = comma splice

writingSC.stem: He worked extra hours __________ enough money for the trip.
writingSC.explanation_th: infinitive บอกจุดประสงค์ → to save | for saving/save/saved รูปผิด

writingSC.stem: Would you consider __________ the meeting to next week?
writingSC.explanation_th: consider + V-ing → postponing | to postpone ผิด

writingSC.stem: She succeeded __________ the difficult exam on her first attempt.
writingSC.explanation_th: succeed in + V-ing → in passing | to pass/at passing ผิด

writingSC.stem: The instructions were unclear; __________, we managed to assemble the shelf.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขัดแย้ง → even so | therefore/thus = เหตุผล (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: She couldn't explain __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงปกติ → where the money had gone | where had... ผิด

writingSC.stem: __________ to admit his mistake, he apologized to the team.
writingSC.explanation_th: ลดรูป (Being willing → Willing) + to V → Willing to admit | Willingly = adv (ผิด), He was willing = comma splice

writingSC.stem: The closer the exam gets, __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: The + comparative..., the + comparative → the more nervous I feel | อื่นไม่เข้าคู่ the...the

writingSC.stem: Had we booked earlier, we __________ better seats.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 3 กลับรูป (Had we booked): would have + V3 → would have got | อื่นผิด tense

writingSC.stem: __________ was her courage that inspired the whole team.
writingSC.explanation_th: it-cleft: It + was + ส่วนเน้น + that → It was her courage that... | That/What/There ไม่เข้ารูป

writingSC.stem: The number of road accidents __________ sharply this year.
writingSC.explanation_th: the number of + ... ใช้เอกพจน์ → has fallen | have fallen ผิด SVA

writingSC.stem: Only after finishing the course __________ for the certificate.
writingSC.explanation_th: Only after... ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: can you apply | you can apply ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: What I don't understand is __________.
options: why did he change his mind
why does he change his mind
why has he changed his mind
writingSC.explanation_th: noun clause เป็นส่วนเติมเต็ม เรียงปกติ → why he changed his mind | why did he... ผิด

writingSC.stem: The road, __________ by the flood, was closed for repairs.
writingSC.explanation_th: past participle ลดรูป passive (which was damaged) → damaged | damaging = active (ผิด)

writingSC.stem: If she __________ harder, she would pass easily.
writingSC.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 2 (สมมติปัจจุบัน): if + past → studied | studies/had studied ผิด tense

writingSC.stem: We need to find out __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: embedded question เรียงประธาน+กริยาแบบบอกเล่า ไม่ผันแบบคำถาม → how the error happened | how did/does/has the error happen ผิด (ผันแบบคำถามตรง)

writingSC.stem: Only by working together __________ this goal.
writingSC.explanation_th: Only by... ขึ้นต้น → ผัน: can we achieve | we can achieve ไม่ผัน

writingSC.stem: The trip was exciting, educational, and __________.
writingSC.explanation_th: ขนานกับ adj (exciting, educational) → surprisingly cheap | อื่นไม่ใช่ adj

writingSC.stem: The author __________ is coming to our school next week.
writingSC.explanation_th: relative clause กรรม (ของ admire) → whom I admire most | which/what ผิด (ใช้กับคน)

writingSC.stem: __________ they will accept our offer is still unknown.
